title: Thunder Road
description: 'An inconic rock ballad that serves as an epic, emotional invitation to escape a dead-end town'

title: Stairway to Heaven
description: 'An iconic 8-minute progressive rock epic featuring a gradual build from acoustic for folk to electric hard rock'

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
description: 'A groundbreaking, six-minute suite written by Freddie Mercury that defies rock conventions by blending balladry, opera, and hard rock without a chorus'

title: Sweet Child O' Mine
description: 'Classic rock ballad known for its iconic opening guitar riff by Slash and emotional vocals by Axl Rose'

title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
description: 'A 1991 grunge anthem that brought alternative rock to the mainstream'

title: Hotel California
description: 'A classic rock song featuring a famous dual-guitar solo, using a surreal, eerie hotel as a metaphor for the dark underbelly of the American Dream'

title: Under Pressure
description: 'An iconic rock duet exploring the intense psychological and societal pressures of modern life, featuring a famous bassline created during a spontaneous jam session'

title: Back in Black
description: 'A legendary hard rock anthem serving as a defiant tribute to former lead singer Bon Scott'

title: Free Bird
description: 'A Southern Rock ballad about independence, exploring a man’s inability to settle down'

title: Dream On
description: 'A power ballad written and sung by Steven Tyler, often interpreted as an anthem about preserving to make dreams come true, while also reflecting on aging and the passage of time'
